name: Signal Handler Function Associated with Multiple Signals
description: The product defines a single function as the handler for multiple signals, creating a vulnerability where concurrent signal delivery can cause the handler to execute simultaneously, corrupting shared state through race conditions.
detection_pattern: CONTROL[signal_handler_function] is registered for multiple signal types via META[signal_registration], allowing concurrent invocation that accesses STORAGE[shared_state] without CONTROL[reentrancy_protection] to prevent race conditions
